name: recorded: model leaked social junk into notes (bagels)

structured.title: 4 Ingredient Protein Bagels
directions: Mix flour and yogurt until a shaggy dough forms, then knead 2 minutes.
Divide into 4, roll into ropes and pinch into rings.
Brush with egg and coat generously with seasoning.

notes.text: Comment BAGEL below and I'll DM you the macros! Use code PROTEIN20 for 20% off my ebook, link in bio.
